hero.title: Creative Frontend Developer
hero.intro: I design and build vibrant, interactive digital experiences using modern technologies. Specializing in high-performance frontend architectures, responsive designs, and custom graphics.
skills.title: Technical Arsenal
skills.subtitle: Technologies, frameworks, and tools I use to bring ideas to life.
projects.title: Salient Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of web applications, experiments, and interactive games.
projects.mario.desc: A custom retro arcade game built with HTML5 Canvas, pure JavaScript, and custom physics loops.
projects.rxjs.desc: A real-time telemetry dashboard featuring high-frequency WebSocket streams, custom RxJS throttled views, and interactive SVG charts.
projects.glass.desc: A premium component library implementing clean glassmorphism patterns, custom CSS variables, and fluid responsive design.
